## Summary

- Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual Kindle/Scribe or browser check, if UI behavior changed:

## Risk and data boundary

- [ ] No private diary entries, handwriting images, credentials, remote bookmark keys, host secrets, or private Hermes responses are included.
- [ ] Auth, Tailscale Funnel, Live Page publishing, image retention, and Hermes adapter boundaries are unchanged or explicitly tested.

## AI assistance

- [ ] No AI assistance was used.
- [ ] AI assistance was used, and a human reviewed the generated changes.
